# 🎯 Task 09.1: Language Detection & Routing

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 3 days | **M6** | **P0** | **Depends:** 01.6 ✅ | **Blocks:** 09.2

## 🎬 What You'll Build
Real-time query language detection and routing to appropriate processing pipeline. <5ms latency.

## 📋 Daily Breakdown
**Day 1:** Integrate Task 01.2 language detector with query pipeline  
**Day 2:** Language-specific routing logic, cache for common queries  
**Day 3:** Performance optimization (<5ms), testing with 10+ languages

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- Detects language in <5ms
- Routes to correct pipeline automatically
- Handles mixed-language queries
- Cache hit rate ≥80% for head queries

## 📊 Required Evidence
- Latency benchmark for cold and cached detection at p50/p95/p99.
- Routing test matrix covering Persian, Arabic, English, mixed Persian/English, CJK, Cyrillic, unknown, and short queries.
- Confusion report showing misrouted queries and whether fallback routing prevented user-visible failure.
- Cache-hit report for head queries with invalidation and versioning behavior documented.

## 🎉 Celebration: Demo instant language detection!
## 📦 Delivers: `LanguageDetector.cpp` (C++ integration)
## 🚀 Next: 09.2 (Stopword Filter)
